name: COMPASS MINERALS INTERNATIONAL INC
business: Compass Minerals is a leading provider of essential minerals, primarily salt and plant nutrition. The company produces and sells salt (sodium chloride and magnesium chloride) for highway deicing, consumer, industrial, chemical, and agricultural applications, and sulfate of potash (SOP) specialty fertilizer for crop nutrition. Its products are marketed in North America and the UK.
sellsTo: states, provinces, counties, municipalities and road maintenance contractors
chemical customers (producers of vinyls, pulp and paper, water treatment)
consumer and industrial markets (water conditioning, food processing, ice control, agricultural)
distributors and retailers of crop inputs, growers, and industrial users

exposures.sentence: The largest underground rock salt mine in the world in Goderich, Ontario, Canada;
Our plant nutrition products help improve the quality and yield of crops, while supporting sustainable agriculture.

Our principal chemical customers are producers of intermediate chemical products used in the production of vinyls and other chemicals, pulp and paper, as well as water treatment and a variety of other industrial uses.
Sales of our consumer and industrial products accounted for 37% of our fiscal 2025 Salt segment sales.

tamClaims.claim: North American highway deicing rock salt consumption is approximately 39 million tons per year.
tamClaims.sentence: In our primary markets, we estimate that the consumption of highway deicing rock salt in North America, including rock salt used in chemical manufacturing processes, is approximately 39 million tons per year, assuming average winter weather conditions.

tamClaims.claim: UK highway deicing salt consumption is approximately 2 million tons per year.
tamClaims.sentence: In the UK, we estimate that the consumption of highway deicing salt is approximately 2 million tons per year, assuming average winter weather conditions.

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide consumption of all potash fertilizers is approximately 81 million tons annually, with SOP representing approximately 9% of all potash production.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on data from Green Markets A Bloomberg Company, management estimates the average annual worldwide consumption of all potash fertilizers is approximately 81 million tons, with MOP accounting for approximately 88% of all potash used in fertilizer production. SOP represents approximately 9% of all potash production.
